context: Checks whether the agent understands reactive transaction lifetime and avoids blocking waits or publishing externally before durable commit.

checklist.name: Reactive transaction model
checklist.description: Uses the project-supported reactive transaction facility or Panache transaction composition rather than relying on a blocking-style annotation assumption.

checklist.name: No blocking await
checklist.description: Removes await().indefinitely from the reactive request path and preserves non-blocking composition.

checklist.name: Transaction lifetime
checklist.description: Keeps persistence and dependent operations in a returned Uni chain whose completion/failure controls the transaction.

checklist.name: Commit-event consistency
checklist.description: Recognizes that publishing before durable commit can produce a false event and evaluates after-commit support, transactional messaging, or an outbox based on guarantees.

checklist.name: Idempotency and retry
checklist.description: Defines an idempotency key/unique constraint or equivalent duplicate protection for gateway retries.

checklist.name: Failure cancellation retry semantics
checklist.description: Covers persistence failure, publish failure, cancellation, timeout, and retry ownership without indiscriminate retries.

checklist.name: Boundary discipline
checklist.description: Keeps entity/DTO and response timing concerns explicit and avoids leaking a session-bound entity beyond safe scope.

checklist.name: Tests
checklist.description: Specifies integration tests proving rollback, no false event, successful event, duplicate retry behavior, and non-blocking execution.

checklist.name: Version/source-of-truth check
checklist.description: Verifies exact Hibernate Reactive Panache/Quarkus APIs in the project BOM instead of inventing annotations or chain methods.
